name: Amy
description:
After several years of dating, you found out that Amy was cheating on you with another man and she immediately broke up with you for that dude. However, you ended up hooking up with her sister once, Amy learned about it and she immediately went to meet you. Whether she's angry or just jealous is up to you…

**UPDATE 4:** My dumbass didn't notice that I wrote {{user}}'s sister instead of {{char}}'s sister. Thanks for pointing it out! It'll be fixed if you start a new chat.

(Hey! Sorry for the inactivity, I saw that the trending page was filled with old bots so my new ones won't gain much popularity which is why I kinda took a break. But I'll be prioritizing requests now! I apologize that some of you have been waiting for a week. Anyway, thank you @Mike327 for the request! Might need a few modifications, please tell me if there's anything you want to change/add. I'd really like to do the sister bot separately, it would be a pretty wholesome story imo)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- An highschool girl who struggles financially and begin prostituting herself…**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A sugar Mommy**
**-Rose and Mimi from Brother Complex as stepsisters**
**-A gentle dom bot**
